headline: Mattr Appoints New Director
summary: TORONTO, June 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Mattr Corp. (“Mattr” or the “Company”) (TSX: MATR) announced the appointment of Michael Lucas as a director of the Company effective June 1, 2026. Mr. Lucas will serve on both the Audit and Compensation & Organizational Development Committees of Mattr. Mr. Lucas is an accomplished executive leader with more than 25 years of experience in complex global manufacturing and industrial technology businesses. headline: How The Dover (DOV) Investment Narrative Is Evolving Without Changes To Fair Value
summary: Dover’s latest analyst narrative comes with no change in the price target, giving you a clear, steady reference point for how the stock is currently framed. With targets holding where they are, the focus turns to what might shift that view next. In the sections that follow, you will see how to track these updates so you can stay aligned with how the story around Dover evolves over time. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story. Head over to our Company Report to find new ways...
